response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project involvement via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric responsibilities of the role.
strengths: Proven experience building geospatial platforms (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Strong background in distributed systems, low-latency apps, and Linux server development
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No visible commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not the C++-heavy core of the job
Limited evidence of distributed systems expertise in fault tolerance or consistency at scale
